title: Mantashe warns South Africans against moving from fossil fuels too quickly
description: Mineral Resources Minister Gwede Mantashe has doubled down on his view that fossil fuels will remain part of South Africa's energy mix for some time and should not be discarded before alternative technologies have been proven to work reliably.

title: An ancient home that was moved brick-by-brick and beam-by-beam half way across England
description: Britwell Priors brings an entirely new meaning to the words 'moving house' —and its curious history means that it offers new owners almost unheard of flexibility.

title: Scientists discover massive ancient whale graveyard off Australia
description: Scientists have discovered what is believed to be the world's largest whale graveyard, off the coast of Australia, with fossils dating back millions of years, according to a n...

title: Fossil Fuel Wealth Fails to Deliver Development in Africa – Report
description: A new report examining the economic impact of oil and gas production in Africa has found that fossil fuels have failed to deliver sustained or inclusive economic development, observing that the resources have contributed to economic vulnerability and inequality and have constrained growth through prohibitive commodity prices, inflation, and weak local currencies. It reveals that [...]

title: Four ancient wellness rituals from Eastern India you must follow this summer
description: Across West Bengal, Odisha, Bihar and Jharkhand’s approach to wellbeing is deeply rooted in climate adaptation & a remarkable understanding of local ecosystems
